articles.title: NASA ends mission after loss of Mars probe
articles.summary:
📰 기술 관련 뉴스
📢 NASA ends mission after loss of Mars probe
articles.content: Scientific spacecraft MAVEN -- short for Mars Atmosphere and Volatile Evolution -- went into Martian orbit in 2014. The US space agency said Wednesday it would investigate the cause of the loss

articles.title: Police appeal for information on missing 16-year-old girl last seen in Woodlands over a month ago
articles.summary:
📰 교육, 취업, 법률 관련 뉴스
📢 Police appeal for information on missing 16-year-old girl last seen in Woodlands...
articles.content: The address is the location of Woodlands Ring Secondary School, which is currently undergoing upgrading works. Those with information are urged to contact the police hotline at 1800-255-0000 or submit information online at www.police.gov.sg/i-witness. All information will be kept strictly confidential, the police said.

articles.title: Broadcom slides after AI chip outlook disappoints investors
articles.summary: 📰 시장 관련 뉴스\n📢 Broadcom slides after AI chip outlook disappoints investors...
articles.content: Analysts predicted US$17.2 billion on average, according to data compiled by Bloomberg. That forecast fell short of the average estimate of US$57.6 billion. Though the company is making headway in pivoting to artificial intelligence customers, it’s up against outsized investor expectations. Broadcom added roughly US$270 billion in market value over the last five trading sessions before the earnings report, fuelled by AI optimism. Broadcom has signed and expanded long-term deals with companies...
